metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🩺 SOC Health & Coverage
---
The SOC is blind when a connector silently fails. This workbook tracks data source ingestion health, agent connectivity, Sentinel connector status, and ingestion latency. A silent failure here means missed detections across every other workbook."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 💓 Agent Heartbeat Health"},"name":"heartbeat-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment
| summarize
    TotalAgents = count(),
    OnlineAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat > ago(15m)),
    WarningAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat between (ago(1h) .. ago(15m))),
    OfflineAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat < ago(1h))
| project TotalAgents, OnlineAgents, WarningAgents, OfflineAgents","size":4,"title":"Agent health summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"OnlineAgents","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"green"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-agents"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment, Version
| extend Status = case(
    LastHeartbeat > ago(15m), 'Online',
    LastHeartbeat > ago(1h), 'Warning',
    'Offline'
)
| where Status != 'Online'
| project Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment, Status, LastHeartbeat, Version
| sort by LastHeartbeat asc","size":0,"title":"Agents not recently seen — warning or offline","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LastHeartbeat","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"Status","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Offline","representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Warning","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"LastHeartbeat","sortOrder":1}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-offline-agents"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| summarize AgentCount = dcount(Computer) by OSType, ComputerEnvironment
| sort by AgentCount desc","size":3,"title":"Agent distribution by OS and environment","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"customWidth":"40","name":"chart-agent-dist"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔌 Sentinel Connector Health"},"name":"connector-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SentinelHealth
| where SentinelResourceType == 'Data connector'
| summarize LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated), LastStatus = arg_max(TimeGenerated, Status) by SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind
| project SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind, LastStatus = tostring(LastStatus.Status), LastEvent
| sort by LastEvent asc","size":0,"title":"Connector health — last status per connector","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LastEvent","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"LastStatus","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Success","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Failure","representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-connector-health"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SentinelHealth
| where SentinelResourceType == 'Data connector'
| where Status == 'Failure'
| project TimeGenerated, SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind, Reason, Description
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Connector failures","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-connector-failures"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Data Source Ingestion Volume"},"name":"ingestion-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"union withsource=TableName
    (CommonSecurityLog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'CommonSecurityLog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (Syslog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'Syslog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (SecurityEvent | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'SecurityEvent', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (W3CIISLog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'W3CIISLog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (AzureActivity | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'AzureActivity', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h))
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Ingestion volume per table over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart","chartSettings":{"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"chart-ingestion-volume"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let Tables = datatable(TableName: string)[
    'CommonSecurityLog', 'Syslog', 'SecurityEvent', 'W3CIISLog',
    'AzureActivity', 'AuditLogs', 'SigninLogs', 'Heartbeat'
];
Tables
| extend LastSeen = toscalar(
    union withsource=T
        (CommonSecurityLog | where TableName == 'CommonSecurityLog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (Syslog | where TableName == 'Syslog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (SecurityEvent | where TableName == 'SecurityEvent' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (W3CIISLog | where TableName == 'W3CIISLog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (AzureActivity | where TableName == 'AzureActivity' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (AuditLogs | where TableName == 'AuditLogs' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (SigninLogs | where TableName == 'SigninLogs' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (Heartbeat | where TableName == 'Heartbeat' | summarize max(TimeGenerated))
    | summarize max(Column1)
)","size":4,"title":"Last event received per key table","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-last-event"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
